description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school. Students can pre-order books through Rakestraw Bookstore to have them signed on the day of the visit. Books will be delivered to the school on the day of the visit. When placing orders, use the school's shipping address: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School MPR, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: TK and Kindergarten only. Parents are invited to see what TK and Kindergarten students have been working on in Music class with Mrs. Gold. There will be a livestream of the showcase for anyone who cannot attend in person (link will be sent out a few days before the event). For questions, contact Mrs. Gold at jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org.
